title: CloudSettings
description: A simple mod that synchronize your options.txt to other modpack instances
body:
![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cloud_Settings/BH_CS_Title.png)
This Mod allows you to synchronize all your settings to a cloud storage and automatically loads them whenever you start you game.

The Cloud Service is currently hosted by BisectHosting.

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cloud_Settings/BH_CS_BisectPromo.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/bloodmoon)


### Are you using this Mod in a Modpack?

Send me a [Message on CurseForge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/private-messages/send?recipient=professorakachris) and I'll add your Modpack into a advertisement slot.
